core.name: One-command setup
core.description: Docker, SSL, DB, assets — running in minutes
core.details: `bash bin/setup-env` spins up Docker containers (MySQL, Redis, Mailpit), generates self-signed SSL certificates, installs PHP and Node dependencies, runs migrations, and builds frontend assets. No local PHP or MySQL required.

core.name: Hot reload (HMR)
core.description: Instant browser updates with no page refresh
core.details: Vite's Hot Module Replacement updates only the changed module in the browser instantly, without a full page reload. Your Vue component state is preserved across edits.

core.name: Type-safe routes
core.description: Ziggy generates TypeScript helpers from Laravel routes
core.details: Ziggy exports all named Laravel routes to the frontend as a typed object. You get autocompletion and compile-time errors when calling `route('user.profile', { id })` instead of building URLs by hand.

core.name: SSR opt-in
core.details: Add `->withSSR()` to any `Inertia::render()` call to server-render that page. The SSR server starts automatically with `composer dev`. Use it for public SEO pages; authenticated pages skip it by default.

core.name: Filament admin
core.description: Full admin panel included out of the box
core.details: Filament 5 is pre-configured with a custom theme and dark mode. Modules like Billing, Roadmap, and Announcements register their own Filament resources automatically — no manual setup needed.

core.name: Dark / light mode
core.details: A CSS variable-based theme system lets users toggle between dark and light mode. The preference is persisted in localStorage and respected on every page load, including SSR.

core.name: shadcn-vue UI
core.details: A curated set of accessible components (Button, Dialog, Dropdown, Table, and more) from shadcn-vue, pre-integrated with Tailwind CSS 4. Components are copied into your codebase — you own and modify them freely.

core.name: PHPStan level 5
core.details: Static analysis runs on every commit via a pre-commit hook and in CI. Level 5 catches undefined variables, wrong argument types, and unreachable code without requiring full type annotations across the codebase.

core.name: Playwright E2E
core.details: End-to-end tests run against a real browser with a seeded test database. Module tests are co-located in `modules/*/tests/e2e/`. A custom `SaucebasePage` helper provides common actions like login and navigation.

core.name: Commitlint
core.details: Conventional commit format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.) is enforced by a commit-msg hook. This feeds into automated changelog generation and keeps `git log` readable across the team.

modules.title: Auth
modules.description: Complete authentication system with login, registration, magic link (passwordless), password reset, email verification, and OAuth integration (Google, GitHub).

features.name: Login & Register
features.description: Login, registration, and password reset flows
features.details: Full login, registration, and password reset flows with pre-built Vue pages, form validation, rate limiting, and redirect handling after authentication.

features.name: Email Verification
features.details: Users receive a verification email after registration. Protected routes can require a verified email via the `verified` middleware. A resend flow is included.

features.name: OAuth
features.details: Google and GitHub OAuth via Laravel Socialite. One config entry per provider in `.env`. New users are created automatically; existing users are linked by email.

features.name: Security
features.details: All auth routes are rate-limited. CSRF tokens are injected into every Inertia response. Session fixation is prevented on login.

features.name: Magic Link
features.details: Users enter their email and receive a signed, time-limited login link. No password required. Powered by a signed URL with a 15-minute expiry and single-use enforcement.

modules.title: Settings
modules.description: Flexible settings management for user preferences and system-wide configuration with validation and caching.

features.name: User Preferences
features.details: Per-user key-value settings stored in the database. Accessible via `$user->setting('notifications.email', true)`. Type-cast values and dot-notation keys are supported.

features.name: System Config
features.details: Application-wide settings managed from the Filament admin panel. Stored in the database, cached in Redis. Accessible anywhere via `setting('site.name')`.

features.name: Caching
features.details: Settings are cached per-user and per-scope using Laravel's cache system. The cache is automatically invalidated when a setting is updated, keeping reads fast without stale data.

modules.title: Billing
modules.description: Subscription management and payment processing via Stripe with checkout sessions, billing portal, invoices, and webhook processing.

features.name: Checkout
features.details: Stripe Checkout sessions are created server-side and redirect users to Stripe's hosted payment page. Supports one-time payments and recurring subscriptions.

features.name: Billing Portal
features.details: Authenticated users are redirected to Stripe's hosted billing portal where they can update payment methods, download invoices, and cancel or modify their subscription.

features.name: Invoices
features.description: Invoice list and stored payment methods
features.details: Lists the user's Stripe invoices with status, amount, and PDF download links. Stored payment methods are shown alongside for easy management.

features.name: Webhooks
features.details: Stripe webhook events are received, signature-verified, and processed idempotently. Duplicate events are safely ignored via event ID tracking stored in the database.

modules.title: Roadmap
modules.description: Public roadmap with feature requests, voting, moderation, six statuses, and a Filament admin panel.

features.name: Feature Requests
features.details: Users submit ideas and bug reports on a public roadmap. Posts include a title, description, and category. Admins can edit or remove any post from the Filament panel.

features.name: Voting
features.details: Authenticated users upvote items they care about. Vote counts are displayed and used to sort the roadmap. One vote per user per item, with instant optimistic UI updates.

features.name: Admin Panel
features.details: A Filament resource for moderating roadmap items. Admins can change status (Planned, In Progress, Completed, etc.), pin items to the top, and respond to user posts.

modules.title: Announcements
modules.description: Site-wide announcement banners with scheduling, audience targeting, and cookie-based dismissal — managed from the Filament admin panel.

features.name: Banner
features.description: Fixed bar above the nav on every page
features.details: A fixed bar rendered above the navigation on every page. Built with an Inertia shared prop so it works with SSR and client-side navigation without additional requests.

features.name: Scheduling
features.description: Set start and end times for banners
features.details: Set a `starts_at` and `ends_at` timestamp on any announcement. Visibility is evaluated on every request — no cron job or queue worker needed.

features.name: Audience Targeting
features.description: Show on public, authenticated pages, or both
features.details: Control whether the banner appears on public (unauthenticated) pages, authenticated pages, or both. Configured independently per announcement.

features.name: Dismissal
features.details: A ✕ button lets users permanently dismiss a banner. The dismissed state is stored in a cookie (1-year expiry) with no database writes. A new announcement with a different ID will reappear regardless.

features.name: Admin Panel
features.details: Create, edit, and delete announcements in Filament. The rich text editor supports bold, italic, underline, links, and lists for formatting banner content.

modules.title: Blog
modules.description: Full-featured blog with posts, categories, tags, and a Filament admin panel for content management.

features.name: Posts
features.details: Create and publish blog posts with a rich text editor, slug, excerpt, cover image, and publish date. Supports draft and scheduled publishing.

features.name: Categories & Tags
features.description: Organize content with categories and tags
features.details: Organize posts into hierarchical categories and tag them for filtering. Category and tag archive pages are automatically generated with pagination.

features.name: Admin Panel
features.description: Filament admin panel for content management
features.details: Manage all blog content from Filament with draft/published status, scheduled publishing, and bulk actions for efficient content management.

features.name: SEO Optimized
features.description: Meta tags, Open Graph, and structured data for every post
features.details: Each post gets its own meta title, description, Open Graph image, and JSON-LD structured data for rich search results and social sharing previews.

modules.title: Teams
modules.description: Multi-user team collaboration with role-based permissions, invitations, and team switching for B2B SaaS applications.

features.name: Team Collaboration
features.details: Users can create and switch between multiple teams. All data is automatically scoped to the active team, making it straightforward to build B2B multi-tenant applications.

features.name: Role Permissions
features.details: Built-in owner, admin, and member roles with permission checks via `$user->hasTeamPermission('billing')`. Role definitions are customizable to match your application's needs.

features.name: Invitations
features.details: Invite users to a team by email. Invited users receive an email with an accept link. Pending invitations are managed from the team settings page and expire after 7 days.
